description.ko: 물리적 형태와 디지털 혼돈이 만나는 KURO-X의 시각적 탐구로, 고대비 사이버네틱 풍경 속에서 날카로운 기하학적 파편과 동기화된 글리치 패턴을 선보입니다.
description.en: A stunning visual exploration of KURO-X where physical form meets digital chaos, featuring sharp geometric shards and synchronized glitch patterns in a high-contrast cybernetic landscape.

prompt: KURO-X character in a high-tech geometric glitch environment, sharp low-poly fragments, digital distortion, neon chromatic aberration, square and triangle data artifacts, futuristic armor, deep obsidian black and electric purple highlights, cyberpunk aesthetic, 8k resolution, ultra-detailed ray tracing, fragmented reality
